image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered why one space rock has a tail?
Context visual: Comets and asteroids are remnants from the solar system's birth, but they’re very different.
Escalation visual: Comets are icy, with frozen gases. When they near the sun? They develop a glowing tail!
Evidence visual: Asteroids, on the other hand, are rocky and metallic. No ice, no tail.
Payoff visual: So, next time you gaze at the sky, remember: one’s a frosty wanderer, the other, a rugged remnant.
Cta visual: Curious about more space mysteries? Hit that follow button!
